creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 213190
xz-compressed build log

www/nginx-devel has failed to package recently, I am currently trying to build r531086 from ports' head/:

[00:01:28] ===> Staging rc.d startup script(s)
[00:01:28] ===========================================================================
[00:01:28] =======================<phase: package        >============================
[00:01:31] ===>  Building package for nginx-devel-1.17.9_1
[00:01:31] pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/nginx-devel/work/stage/usr/local/%%STREAM%%@comment libexec/nginx/ngx_stream_js_module.so:No such file or directory
[00:01:31] pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/nginx-devel/work/stage/usr/local/%%STREAM%%libexec/nginx/ngx_stream_module.so:No such file or directory
[00:01:34] *** Error code 1
[00:01:34] 
[00:01:34] Stop.
[00:01:34] make: stopped in /usr/ports/www/nginx-devel
[00:01:35] =>> Cleaning up wrkdir
[00:01:41] ===>  Cleaning for nginx-devel-1.17.9_1
[00:01:45] build of www/nginx-devel | nginx-devel-1.17.9_1 ended at Wed Apr  8 10:17:32 CEST 2020
[00:01:45] build time: 00:01:43
[00:01:45] !!! build failure encountered !!!


I believe options are default:
